_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: DCS World Dedicated Server
author: DavidV98
description: DCS World Dedicated Server running on Linux via Wine (WineHQ Staging, win64). Handles full automated installation from Eagle Dynamics on first run, optional terrain module installation, and auto-updates on start.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name shown in the DCS multiplayer server browser.

variables.name: Game Port
variables.description: UDP port for DCS multiplayer. DCS also uses port+1 (e.g. 10308 and 10309). Allocate both in the Pterodactyl panel under Ports.

variables.name: WebGUI Port
variables.description: TCP port for the DCS server WebGUI remote control panel. Allocate this in the Pterodactyl panel under Ports.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Password required to join the server. Leave blank for a public server.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of concurrent players allowed on the server.

variables.name: Write Directory
variables.description: The Saved Games profile name DCS uses for config, missions, and logs. Only change this if running multiple DCS servers on the same Wings node.

variables.name: Terrain Modules
variables.description: Space-separated list of terrain module names to install. Caucasus is included by default. Example: MARIANAISLANDS_terrain SYRIA_terrain NEVADA_terrain. Paid maps require an Eagle Dynamics account.

variables.name: Mission File
variables.description: Filename of the .miz mission in the Missions folder to load on start. The server will not start hosting without a valid mission. A bundled mission is seeded automatically on first install. Upload your own .miz via the file manager and set this to its filename. Mission should match your installed terrain.

variables.name: Update Branch
variables.description: DCS release branch to track. Leave blank for the default stable release. Options: dcs_server.release, dcs_server.openbeta.

variables.name: Auto Update on Start
variables.description: Set to 1 to run DCS_updater.exe before each server start. Keeps DCS current but adds 5-20 minutes to startup time.

variables.name: Installer Download URL
variables.description: Direct download URL for the DCS Dedicated Server installer .exe. Update this here if Eagle Dynamics changes the URL without re-importing the egg.

variables.name: Eagle Dynamics Username
variables.description: Your Eagle Dynamics account username/email. Required on first launch so the dedicated server can authenticate. The login token persists afterward, so this is only used once. Leave blank to log in manually via the debug VNC instead.

variables.name: Eagle Dynamics Password
variables.description: Your Eagle Dynamics account password. Used only to fill the first-launch login window; the token persists afterward. Stored as a server variable — treat with care.

variables.name: Enable Debug VNC
variables.description: Set to 1 to start a browser-based noVNC console showing the DCS GUI for troubleshooting (first-time login, watching mission load, etc). Reachable at http://<wings-host-ip>:6080/vnc.html. SECURITY: no password — use only on a trusted local network, never expose port 6080 publicly.
